summary: Matched the Battlefield stage module by replacing asm/melee/gr/grbattle.s with src/melee/gr/grbattle.c and wiring it into the normal C object lists. The C recreation defines the Battlefield StageData, StageCallbacks table, stage init/destruct callbacks, background GObj creation, JObj translation setup, and randomized background cycling logic. Supporting changes adjusted Map layout, added/typed needed function declarations, centralized assert_line, and tweaked HSD_JObj inline helpers to reduce stack usage, as noted in the PR body.

key_files.role: Deleted 838-line assembly implementation after matching the module in C.
New 392-line C implementation of Battlefield stage data, callbacks, GObj setup, JObj transforms, and background swap state machine.
New local header declaring the static grbattle callbacks used by the StageCallbacks table.
Reworked JObj inline helpers, especially HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty and HSD_JObjSetTranslate, to use assert_line and simpler expressions.
Adjusted Map layout from byte-sized xC4/xC5/xC6 fields to s32 xC4, xC8, xCC, xD0 fields needed by grbattle.
Introduced a local UnkUserData2 layout so grstory could keep byte/s16 field interpretation after Map changed.
Typed declarations for func_801C2BA4, func_801C2CF4, and func_801C5DB0.
Swapped grbattle object from asm to C in TEXT_O_FILES.
Updated local assertions to the new global assert_line argument order.

what_changed: Removed asm/melee/gr/grbattle.s and replaced it with src/melee/gr/grbattle.c, then changed obj_files.mk from asm/melee/gr/grbattle.s.o to src/melee/gr/grbattle.c.o.
Added Battlefield StageData lbl_803E7E38, StageCallbacks lbl_803E7DA0[7], and static callbacks retaining existing address-based names such as func_80219C98 and lbl_80219CA4.

Implemented stage initialization that sets stage_info.unk8C bitfields, creates map/background GObjs via func_80219D84, branches on func_8016B3D8 and Stage_80225194 values 0x111/0xF5, then runs stage setup functions and clears a local load-time flag.

Implemented func_80219D84 to allocate a stage GObj by id, initialize Map fields, install GX link func_801C5DB0, apply StageCallbacks callback0/callback2/callback3, and OSReport if the GObj cannot be obtained.
Implemented JObj translation update logic in lbl_80219E6C using func_801C9A70, func_801C2CF4, and HSD_JObjSetTranslate for ids 0 through 3 while lbl_804D6AC8 is set.

Implemented randomized Battlefield background cycling in lbl_8021A3BC using HSD_Randi, BATTLE_BG_MAX = 3, candidate ids {1, 2, 4}, func_801C2BA4, func_801C9604, func_801C96E8, func_801C4A08, and assert_line checks.

Extended Map in stage.h with s32 xC4, xCC, and xD0 fields and moved padding to xD4; grstory.c was protected from that shared struct change by adding a local UnkUserData2 with its prior xC4/xC5/xC6/xC8 layout.
Added assert_line(line, cond) to include/dolphin/types.h and updated lbvector.c and jobj.h call sites to use the new argument order.
Changed JObj inlines to use assert_line and simpler boolean expressions; the PR body specifically says JObj inlines needed tweaks to reduce stack usage.
Typed previously unknown functions in include/functions.h: func_801C2BA4 returns HSD_GObj*, func_801C2CF4 returns HSD_JObj*, and func_801C5DB0 takes struct _HSD_GObj and s32.
smart_moves: Kept address-derived symbol names and static linkage in grbattle.c/grbattle.h, which minimizes naming churn while still removing the assembly file.
Used a StageCallbacks array matching the original table layout instead of open-coding callback dispatch; func_80219D84 indexes it by map id and handles callback0/callback2/callback3 consistently.
Created a global assert_line(line, cond) macro so decompiled code can reproduce original __FILE__/line/assert-string behavior without repeating custom macros in each source file.
Adjusted HSD_JObj inline bodies for matching constraints instead of treating baselib inlines as fixed; the PR body explicitly calls out reducing stack usage as necessary.
Avoided forcing all stage users into the new Map interpretation by giving grstory.c a file-local UnkUserData2 layout for the fields it expects.
Typed function declarations just enough to support grbattle and related inline calls, improving compiler knowledge for HSD_GObj/HSD_JObj interactions.
decomp_lessons: Matching a stage module may require coordinated changes outside the target file: shared Map layout, function prototypes, assertion macros, and baselib inlines can all affect codegen.
For shared user_data structs, do not assume one stage's discovered field sizes are globally valid; a local compatibility struct can preserve another module's expected layout.
JObj helpers are sensitive matching surfaces. Small inline expression changes, assertion style, return types, and parameter names can change stack usage and generated code.
A central assert_line(line, cond) macro is useful for reproducing original assert line numbers and reducing per-file macro drift.
When replacing asm with C, update both normal and epilogue object lists if applicable; this PR touched obj_files.mk and e_files.mk.
Callback table decomp should preserve table order and nullable callback slots before attempting semantic renames.
naming_conventions: Unidentified stage callbacks kept address labels such as lbl_80219CA4, lbl_8021A3BC, and func_80219D84.
Static data retained address labels such as lbl_803E7DA0 for the StageCallbacks table and lbl_803E7E38 for StageData.
Unknown Map fields used offset-style names like xC4, xC8, xCC, xD0, x1C_callback, and x11_flags.b012.
A file-local compatibility type was named UnkUserData2 in grstory.c when the shared Map type no longer matched that module's field interpretation.
The added grbattle header used guard _grtbattle_h_, matching the diff even though the filename is grbattle.h.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted an 838-line grbattle.s assembly file into a 392-line C file and changed build object selection to compile the C implementation.
Used static const int BATTLE_BG_MAX = 3 and a stack array s16 sp28[BATTLE_BG_MAX] = {1, 2, 4} to reproduce the Battlefield background selection loop.
Inserted unused stack arrays such as u32 unused[2], unused[6], and unused[7] in several callbacks, indicating stack-shape padding for matching.
Used assert_line with original source line values like 527, 535, 539, and 546 in the background cycling logic to match assert call sites.
Simplified HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty to a direct boolean return and HSD_JObjSetTranslate to assert_line plus assignment to reduce inline stack usage.
Retained an apparent standalone expression `gobj;` in lbl_8021A2DC, likely as a codegen/matching artifact rather than meaningful logic.
Preserved OSReport failure text in func_80219D84: "%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n" with __FILE__ and line 232.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or formal reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
The only human note in the PR body was: "Note that some JObj inlines needed to be tweaked to reduce their stack usage".
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename grbattle symbols away from lbl_80219* labels.
Find PRs that further refine the Map struct layout after grbattle changed xC4/xCC/xD0.
Find other stage matches that tweak HSD_JObjSetTranslate or HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty for stack usage.
Find uses of assert_line(line, cond) introduced after PR 327.
Find later fixes to func_801C5DB0 prototype, especially whether the HSD_GObj parameter should be a pointer.
